subject: [PATCH v2 12/28] nfsd: update the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a dir delegation

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify mark when setting or removing a directory delegation in the NFS server. It introduces a new helper function, nfsd_fsnotify_recalc_mask, which recalculates the mask on the nfsd_file's fsnotify_mark based on the current directory delegations on an inode. The function is called when directory delegations are added or removed, ensuring that notifications for relevant events are properly set up or cleared. This patch addresses a specific scenario where directory delegation events were not being properly notified to clients, leading to potential issues with file system consistency and client-side caching.
